hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify and design novel silicon-based anode materials with gravimetric capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable Li⁺ migration channels, because geometric channel stability across charge–discharge states and thermodynamic stability predicted by graph neural network potentials together serve as reliable surrogates for practical electrochemical performance.
